label: Transparent Lemongrass motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Lemongrass transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated lemongrass stalk motif, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact bundle of fresh lemongrass stalks with pale green cylindrical bases, straw-yellow dried outer sheaths, fine vertical ribbing, pointed grass blades, slight natural fan shape, crisp botanical silhouette, realistic waxy plant texture, and subtle cool green shadow tones from a tropical herb garden.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show full stalk bases and upper blade tips without cropping. Keep the bundle upright with a gentle diagonal fan, suitable as a reusable UI motif.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves pale green, straw yellow, muted sage shadow, and natural fibrous lemongrass detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no pot, no soil, no garden scene, no decorative background, no second plant species, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no chopped slices, no citrus fruit.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lemongrass light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named "Morphous Lemongrass", derived from the visible isolated lemongrass stalk cutout reference.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from fresh lemongrass stalks in a tropical herb garden: pale stalk green, straw-yellow dried sheaths, pith cream highlights, muted sage blade shadows, ribbed vertical fiber texture, deep root shadow green, and clean herbal service-system clarity. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the stalk and shadow.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source image, target 3840 x 2160, at least 2400px wide. Keep all labels large, sharp, and readable.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lemongrass, Lemongrass, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, data widgets, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius examples, border and shadow tokens.
Visual style: clean service system for operations dashboards and appointment/data tools, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, vertical lemongrass-rib dividers, pale green primary actions, straw-yellow focus rings, pith-cream surfaces, sage shadow text, restrained clean shadows, compact service navigation, scan-friendly data density.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples using short readable Japanese labels; guidance for Noto Sans JP, compact service labels, tables, command search, and status messages.
Text constraints: use short readable section labels and short UI labels only. Avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no beige-heavy palette, no neon, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Lemongrass.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lemongrass dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for "Morphous Lemongrass" that feels like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible lemongrass cutout and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the same component language, 8px radius system, clean service-system density, vertical lemongrass-rib dividers, pale green primary actions, straw-yellow focus rings, pith-cream foregrounds, muted sage secondary states, and tropical herb garden texture.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source image, target 3840 x 2160, at least 2400px wide. Keep all labels large, sharp, and readable.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lemongrass, Lemongrass, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: dark shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, data widgets, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius examples, border and shadow tokens.
Visual details: deepest root-shadow green background, readable pith-cream text, card surfaces in dark sage green, fresh stalk-green highlights, straw-yellow focus and warning accents, muted blade-rib borders, subtle vertical lemongrass fiber texture overlays, crisp professional operations dashboard layout.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography examples using short readable Japanese labels; compact labels and data tables should remain scan-friendly in dark mode.
Text constraints: use short readable section labels and short UI labels only. Avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon palette, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic blue or purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of Morphous Lemongrass.
